meaning: vt.原谅,申辩,做为...的托辞,为...免去n.饶恕,致歉,理由,口实,借口,清借条,免去
examples: She served up the usual excuse.
Excuse me, is this your seat?
The decision process is neither easy nor quick, but that is not an excuse for shortcuts.
Merging these two underachievers gave Vasella the excuse he needed to vastly alter the business.
